author: gb9t
content:
Phase C /loop iter 10: 2 Tier-3 docs (net pivot cont'd).

net/ipv4/udp.md (220 lines, 13 REQ / 11 AC, 0 open) — UDP (RFC 768) + UDP-Lite (RFC 3828) + UDP-GSO/GRO offload + udp_tunnel framework (VxLAN/GENEVE/FoU/GUE) + sockmap BPF integration + inet_diag dump + UDP-corking. /proc/net/udp + /proc/net/udp6 format-identity.

net/netfilter.md (251 lines, 14 REQ / 14 AC, 0 open) — packet-filter framework: nftables + iptables-legacy + connection tracking (per-protocol state machines) + NAT (SNAT/DNAT/MASQ/REDIR/NETMAP) + ipset + NFLOG + NFQUEUE + flowtables (HW offload) + per-namespace state. NFNL netlink ABI byte-identity. TLA+ model models/net/conntrack.tla owned here (mandatory L2).

Total .design/ docs: 59.
